ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), IF( AND( RecordTypeId = "012200000009CuR", OR( ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Addtional debit for substitution"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Additional temp debit"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Additional tyre debit"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Addtional debit for substitution"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Bill extra Km"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Contract termination cancellation"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Debited transfer"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"End contract km"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Fines"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Fuel card bill"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Non received payment"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Purchase bill"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Quotation mistake debit"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Second-hand market"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Substitution"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Total sinister statement"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Traffic tax"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"Use statement"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"billing issues"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Detail__c,"closed car transfer") ), Text(Origin) <> "Email", Invoice_Nbr__c = null ), TRUE, FALSE ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invoice number is mandatory for this detail
